basic_details.job_title: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 12 June 2026 on the official website www.iitp.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years. Relaxations for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD will be given as per the GoI rules.

qualification.education_qualification: B.Tech/B.E. in Biotechnology/Chemical/Biochemical Engineering or allied branches with minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% marks, M.Tech/M.E. in Biotechnology/Chemical/Biochemical Engineering with minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% marks
qualification.details: First class graduate in B. Tech/B. E. in Biotechnology/Chemical/Biochemical Engineering or allied branches with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% of marks. OR M.Tech./M.E. in Biotechnology/Chemical/Biochemical Engineering with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% of marks. Preference given to candidates with background in Downstream processing of therapeutic proteins, Molecular biology and biochemical analysis techniques such as RT-PCR/SDS-PAGE/HPLC-based sample analysis, Mathematical modeling, and relevant industrial experience in therapeutic protein bioprocessing. Candidates preferred with GATE/CSIR-NET score.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Patna Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: First class graduate in B. Tech/B. E. in Biotechnology/Chemical/Biochemical Engineering or allied branches with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% of marks. OR M.Tech./M.E. in Biotechnology/Chemical/Biochemical Engineering with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% of marks. Preference given to candidates with background in Downstream processing of therapeutic proteins, Molecular biology and biochemical analysis techniques such as RT-PCR/SDS-PAGE/HPLC-based sample analysis, Mathematical modeling, and relevant industrial experience in therapeutic protein bioprocessing. Candidates preferred with GATE/CSIR-NET score.

content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 32 years. Relaxations for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD will be given as per the GoI rules.

IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 09-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Patna JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 09-07-2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the JRF post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a B.Tech/B.E. in Biotechnology/Chemical/Biochemical Engineering or allied branches with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% marks, or an M.Tech/M.E. in the same disciplines with a minimum CPI of 6.5 or 60% marks.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow post is 32 years. Age relaxations will be provided as per Government of India rules for SC/ST/OBC/women/PD candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the JRF post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 42,000 per month, plus applicable House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the IIT Patna JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to prepare your bio-data, attach required documents, and send it to the official email address mentioned in the notification before the last date.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the JRF role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves short-listing of candidates followed by an online or offline written test and/or an interview.

faq.question: Q8. Does IIT Patna offer any preference to candidates with specific qualifications or experience?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates with a background in downstream processing of therapeutic proteins, molecular biology, biochemical analysis techniques, mathematical modeling, and relevant industrial experience.

faq.question: Q9. Are candidates with GATE/CSIR-NET scores preferred?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates who have qualified for GATE/CSIR-NET are preferred for this Junior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.
